---
title: "Financial News in Indonesian Language Multi-Class Sentiment Classification Using R Keras_TensorFlow"
author: "Ernest Ferdian"
date: "2025-12-20"
---


```{r Setup, include = FALSE}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(caret)
library(stringr)
library(tm)
library(glmnet)
library(keras)
library(tensorflow)
# install_keras() #install if needed

set.seed(123)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

```{r Data Preparation, include=TRUE}

data_raw <- read.csv("Dataset-CNBCI-Sentimented.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

cat("Columns in Dataset-CNBCI-Sentimented.csv:\n")
print(colnames(data_raw))
cat("\nFirst 3 rows:\n")
print(head(data_raw, 3))

TEXT_COL  <- "judul"
LABEL_COL <- "sentimen"


names(data_raw) <- tolower(names(data_raw))
text_col  <- tolower(TEXT_COL)
label_col <- tolower(LABEL_COL)

if (!text_col %in% names(data_raw)) {
  stop(paste0("Text column '", text_col, "' not found. Check TEXT_COL."))
}
if (!label_col %in% names(data_raw)) {
  stop(paste0("Label column '", label_col, "' not found. Check LABEL_COL."))
}


data <- data_raw %>%
  select(all_of(c(text_col, label_col))) %>%
  rename(
    text_raw = !!text_col,
    label_raw = !!label_col
  )

cat("\nAfter selecting text + label:\n")
print(head(data, 3))

# Explorartory Data Analysis (EDA) - Distribution of labels (raw)
ggplot(data, aes(x = as.factor(label_raw))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "darkred", alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_text(
    stat = "count",
    aes(label = ..count..),
    vjust = -0.5,
    color = "black",
    size = 4
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Raw Sentiment Label Distribution",
    x = "Sentiment Label",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r Label Preparation, include=TRUE}

if (is.numeric(data$label_raw)) {
  cat("\nDetected numeric labels. Mapping to negative/neutral/positive...\n")
  summary(data$label_raw)
  data$sentiment <- dplyr::case_when(
    data$label_raw < 0 ~ "negative",
    data$label_raw > 0 ~ "positive",
    TRUE               ~ "neutral"
  )
} else {
  cat("\nDetected character/factor labels. Normalizing...\n")
  lab <- tolower(trimws(as.character(data$label_raw)))
  lab[lab %in% c("pos", "positive", "positif")] <- "positive"
  lab[lab %in% c("neg", "negative", "negatif")] <- "negative"
  lab[lab %in% c("neu", "neutral", "netral")]   <- "neutral"
  data$sentiment <- lab
}

data$sentiment <- factor(
  data$sentiment,
  levels = c("negative", "neutral", "positive")
)

# Drop rows with unknown labels
data <- data %>% filter(!is.na(sentiment))
cat("\nSentiment label distribution:\n")
print(table(data$sentiment))

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r Text Cleaning, include=TRUE}
clean_text <- function(x) {
  x <- tolower(x)
  x <- gsub("[^a-z0-9\\s]", " ", x)
  x <- gsub("\\s+", " ", x)
  trimws(x)
}

data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    text = clean_text(text_raw)
  ) %>%
  filter(text != "")

cat("\nSample cleaned Indonesian texts:\n")
print(head(data$text, 5))

cat("\nTotal observations after cleaning:", nrow(data), "\n")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r Train Test Split, include=TRUE}
set.seed(123)
train_idx <- createDataPartition(data$sentiment, p = 0.8, list = FALSE)
train_data <- data[train_idx, ]
test_data  <- data[-train_idx, ]

cat("\nTrain size:", nrow(train_data), "\n")
cat("Test size :", nrow(test_data), "\n")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r Baseline, include=TRUE}

train_corpus <- VCorpus(VectorSource(train_data$text))
test_corpus  <- VCorpus(VectorSource(test_data$text))

# Preprocessing controls for TF-IDF (language-agnostic)
ctrl <- list(
  removePunctuation = TRUE,
  removeNumbers = TRUE,
  stopwords = FALSE,
  tolower = TRUE
)

train_dtm <- DocumentTermMatrix(
  train_corpus,
  control = c(ctrl, list(weighting = weightTfIdf))
)

# Use the same vocabulary (dictionary) for test set
train_dtm <- removeSparseTerms(train_dtm, 0.99)
test_dtm  <- DocumentTermMatrix(
  test_corpus,
  control = c(ctrl, list(dictionary = Terms(train_dtm),
                            weighting = weightTfIdf))
)

# Convert to matrices
x_train_tfidf <- as.matrix(train_dtm)
x_test_tfidf  <- as.matrix(test_dtm)

y_train_factor <- train_data$sentiment
y_test_factor  <- test_data$sentiment

# Multinomial Logistic Regression with glmnet

set.seed(123)
cvfit <- cv.glmnet(
  x = x_train_tfidf,
  y = y_train_factor,
  family = "multinomial",
  type.measure = "class"
)

lambda_best <- cvfit$lambda.min
cat("\nBaseline: best lambda from CV:", lambda_best, "\n")

# Predictions on test set
pred_baseline <- predict(
  cvfit,
  newx = x_test_tfidf,
  s = "lambda.min",
  type = "class"
)

pred_baseline <- factor(pred_baseline, levels = levels(y_train_factor))

cm_baseline <- confusionMatrix(pred_baseline, y_test_factor)
cat("\n=== Baseline Confusion Matrix ===\n")
print(cm_baseline)

acc_baseline <- cm_baseline$overall["Accuracy"]
cat("\nBaseline Test Accuracy:", round(acc_baseline, 4), "\n")

# Plot confusion matrix for baseline
cm_base_tbl <- as.data.frame(cm_baseline$table)
ggplot(cm_base_tbl, aes(x = Reference, y = Prediction, fill = Freq)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = Freq), colour = "white", size = 4) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "grey40", high = "lightblue") +
  labs(title = "Baseline Confusion Matrix (TF-IDF + Logistic Regression)",
       x = "True Sentiment", y = "Predicted Sentiment") +
  theme_minimal()

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r Neural Model, include=TRUE}
max_words <- 20000
maxlen    <- 60

train_texts <- train_data$text
test_texts  <- test_data$text

tokenizer <- text_tokenizer(num_words = max_words, oov_token = "<OOV>")
fit_text_tokenizer(tokenizer, train_texts)

train_sequences <- texts_to_sequences(tokenizer, train_texts)
test_sequences  <- texts_to_sequences(tokenizer,  test_texts)

x_train <- pad_sequences(train_sequences, maxlen = maxlen,
                         padding = "post", truncating = "post")
x_test  <- pad_sequences(test_sequences,  maxlen = maxlen,
                         padding = "post", truncating = "post")

dim(x_train); dim(x_test)

# Label preparation

num_classes <- length(levels(train_data$sentiment))

y_train_int <- as.integer(train_data$sentiment) - 1  # 0,1,2
y_test_int  <- as.integer(test_data$sentiment)  - 1

y_train <- to_categorical(y_train_int, num_classes = num_classes)
y_test  <- to_categorical(y_test_int,  num_classes = num_classes)

cat("\nNeural model training label counts:\n")
print(table(y_train_int))
cat("Neural model test label counts:\n")
print(table(y_test_int))


# Build BiLSTM Model

embedding_dim <- 128

model <- keras_model_sequential() %>%
  layer_embedding(
    input_dim = max_words,
    output_dim = embedding_dim,
    input_length = maxlen
  ) %>%
  layer_spatial_dropout_1d(rate = 0.2) %>%
  bidirectional(layer_lstm(units = 128, return_sequences = FALSE)) %>%
  layer_dropout(rate = 0.4) %>%
  layer_dense(units = 64, activation = "relu") %>%
  layer_dropout(rate = 0.4) %>%
  layer_dense(units = num_classes, activation = "softmax")

summary(model)

model %>% compile(
  optimizer = "adam",
  loss      = "categorical_crossentropy",
  metrics   = c("accuracy")
)


# Train BiLSTM Model

batch_size <- 64
epochs     <- 25

callback_es <- callback_early_stopping(
  monitor = "val_loss",
  patience = 3,
  restore_best_weights = TRUE
)

history <- model %>% fit(
  x_train, y_train,
  batch_size = batch_size,
  epochs = epochs,
  validation_split = 0.2,
  callbacks = list(callback_es),
  verbose = 2
)


# Plot training curves

plot(history)

df_hist <- data.frame(
  epoch    = 1:length(history$metrics$loss),
  loss     = history$metrics$loss,
  val_loss = history$metrics$val_loss,
  acc      = history$metrics$accuracy,
  val_acc  = history$metrics$val_accuracy
)

ggplot(df_hist, aes(x = epoch)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = loss, colour = "Train Loss")) +
  geom_line(aes(y = val_loss, colour = "Val Loss")) +
  labs(title = "BiLSTM: Training & Validation Loss",
       x = "Epoch", y = "Loss") +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(df_hist, aes(x = epoch)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = acc, colour = "Train Accuracy")) +
  geom_line(aes(y = val_acc, colour = "Val Accuracy")) +
  labs(title = "BiLSTM: Training & Validation Accuracy",
       x = "Epoch", y = "Accuracy") +
  theme_minimal()


# Evaluate BiLSTM on Test Set

score <- model %>% evaluate(x_test, y_test, verbose = 0)
cat("\nBiLSTM Test loss    :", round(score["loss"], 4), "\n")
cat("BiLSTM Test accuracy:", round(score["accuracy"], 4), "\n")

acc_neural <- as.numeric(score["accuracy"])


# Confusion Matrix for BiLSTM

pred_probs_nn <- model %>% predict(x_test)
pred_int_nn   <- apply(pred_probs_nn, 1, which.max) - 1

label_levels <- levels(train_data$sentiment)

pred_labels_nn <- factor(label_levels[pred_int_nn + 1], levels = label_levels)
true_labels_nn <- factor(label_levels[y_test_int + 1], levels = label_levels)

cm_neural <- confusionMatrix(pred_labels_nn, true_labels_nn)
cat("\n=== BiLSTM Confusion Matrix ===\n")
print(cm_neural)

cm_neural_tbl <- as.data.frame(cm_neural$table)
ggplot(cm_neural_tbl, aes(x = Reference, y = Prediction, fill = Freq)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = Freq), colour = "white", size = 4) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "grey40", high = "lightgreen") +
  labs(title = "Neural Confusion Matrix (Embedding + BiLSTM)",
       x = "True Sentiment", y = "Predicted Sentiment") +
  theme_minimal()

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r Comparison, include=TRUE}

cat("Baseline (TF-IDF + Logistic Regression) Accuracy:",
    round(acc_baseline, 4), "\n")
cat("Neural (Embedding + BiLSTM) Accuracy           :",
    round(acc_neural, 4), "\n")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r Filter Big Caps, include=TRUE}

bigcaps <- c("ADRO", "AMRT", "ANTM", "ARTO", "ASII",
  "BBCA", "BBNI", "BBRI", "BBTN", "BMRI",
  "BRIS", "BRPT", "BUKA", "CPIN", "ELSA",
  "ERAA", "EXCL", "GGRM", "GOTO", "HMSP",
  "HRUM", "ICBP", "INCO", "INDF", "INKP",
  "INTP", "ITMG", "JPFA", "JSMR", "KLBF",
  "MDKA", "MEDC", "MIKA", "MTDL", "PGAS",
  "PTBA", "PTPP", "SMGR", "SMRA", "TBIG",
  "TINS", "TKIM", "TLKM", "TOWR", "UNVR"
)

databc <- data %>%
  mutate(
    text_upper = toupper(text_raw),
    ticker = str_extract(text_upper, paste(bigcaps, collapse = "|"))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ticker))

cat("\nNumber of big-cap news articles (databc):", nrow(databc), "\n")
cat("\nBig-cap ticker distribution (databc):\n")
print(table(databc$ticker))
cat("\nSentiment distribution within big caps (databc):\n")
print(table(databc$sentiment))

databc <- databc %>%
  mutate(
    text = clean_text(text_raw)
  ) %>%
  filter(text != "")

cat("\nSample cleaned Indonesian texts (big caps only, databc):\n")
print(head(databc$text, 5))

cat("\nTotal observations after cleaning (big caps, databc):", nrow(databc), "\n")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r Train Test Split Big Caps, include=TRUE}

set.seed(123)
train_idx_bc <- createDataPartition(databc$sentiment, p = 0.8, list = FALSE)
train_databc <- databc[train_idx_bc, ]
test_databc  <- databc[-train_idx_bc, ]

cat("\nTrain size (databc):", nrow(train_databc), "\n")
cat("Test size  (databc):", nrow(test_databc), "\n")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r Baseline Big Caps, include=TRUE}

train_corpus <- VCorpus(VectorSource(train_databc$text))
test_corpus  <- VCorpus(VectorSource(test_databc$text))

# Preprocessing controls for TF-IDF (language-agnostic)
ctrl <- list(
  removePunctuation = TRUE,
  removeNumbers = TRUE,
  stopwords = FALSE,
  tolower = TRUE
)

train_dtm <- DocumentTermMatrix(
  train_corpus,
  control = c(ctrl, list(weighting = weightTfIdf))
)

# Use the same vocabulary (dictionary) for test set
train_dtm <- removeSparseTerms(train_dtm, 0.99)
test_dtm  <- DocumentTermMatrix(
  test_corpus,
  control = c(ctrl, list(dictionary = Terms(train_dtm),
                            weighting = weightTfIdf))
)

# Convert to matrices
x_train_tfidf <- as.matrix(train_dtm)
x_test_tfidf  <- as.matrix(test_dtm)

y_train_factor <- train_databc$sentiment
y_test_factor  <- test_databc$sentiment

# Fit Multinomial Logistic Regression with glmnet

set.seed(123)
cvfit <- cv.glmnet(
  x = x_train_tfidf,
  y = y_train_factor,
  family = "multinomial",
  type.measure = "class"
)

lambda_best <- cvfit$lambda.min
cat("\nBig Caps Baseline: best lambda from CV:", lambda_best, "\n")

# Predictions on test set
pred_baseline <- predict(
  cvfit,
  newx = x_test_tfidf,
  s = "lambda.min",
  type = "class"
)

pred_baseline <- factor(pred_baseline, levels = levels(y_train_factor))

cm_baseline <- confusionMatrix(pred_baseline, y_test_factor)
cat("\n=== Big Caps Baseline Confusion Matrix ===\n")
print(cm_baseline)

acc_baselinebc <- cm_baseline$overall["Accuracy"]
cat("\nBig Caps Baseline Test Accuracy:", round(acc_baselinebc, 4), "\n")

# Plot confusion matrix for baseline
cm_base_tbl <- as.data.frame(cm_baseline$table)
ggplot(cm_base_tbl, aes(x = Reference, y = Prediction, fill = Freq)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = Freq), colour = "white", size = 4) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "grey40", high = "steelblue") +
  labs(title = "Big Caps Baseline Confusion Matrix (TF-IDF + Logistic Regression)",
       x = "True Sentiment", y = "Predicted Sentiment") +
  theme_minimal()


knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r Neural Model Big Caps, include=TRUE}

max_words <- 20000
maxlen    <- 60

train_texts <- train_databc$text
test_texts  <- test_databc$text

tokenizer <- text_tokenizer(num_words = max_words, oov_token = "<OOV>")
fit_text_tokenizer(tokenizer, train_texts)

train_sequences <- texts_to_sequences(tokenizer, train_texts)
test_sequences  <- texts_to_sequences(tokenizer,  test_texts)

x_train <- pad_sequences(train_sequences, maxlen = maxlen,
                         padding = "post", truncating = "post")
x_test  <- pad_sequences(test_sequences,  maxlen = maxlen,
                         padding = "post", truncating = "post")

dim(x_train); dim(x_test)

# Label Preparation

num_classes <- length(levels(train_databc$sentiment))

y_train_int <- as.integer(train_databc$sentiment) - 1  
y_test_int  <- as.integer(test_databc$sentiment)  - 1

y_train <- to_categorical(y_train_int, num_classes = num_classes)
y_test  <- to_categorical(y_test_int,  num_classes = num_classes)

cat("\nBig Caps Neural model training label counts:\n")
print(table(y_train_int))
cat("Big Caps Neural model test label counts:\n")
print(table(y_test_int))


# Build BiLSTM Model

embedding_dim <- 128

model <- keras_model_sequential() %>%
  layer_embedding(
    input_dim = max_words,
    output_dim = embedding_dim,
    input_length = maxlen
  ) %>%
  layer_spatial_dropout_1d(rate = 0.2) %>%
  bidirectional(layer_lstm(units = 128, return_sequences = FALSE)) %>%
  layer_dropout(rate = 0.4) %>%
  layer_dense(units = 64, activation = "relu") %>%
  layer_dropout(rate = 0.4) %>%
  layer_dense(units = num_classes, activation = "softmax")

summary(model)

model %>% compile(
  optimizer = "adam",
  loss      = "categorical_crossentropy",
  metrics   = c("accuracy")
)


# Train BiLSTM

batch_size <- 64
epochs     <- 25

callback_es <- callback_early_stopping(
  monitor = "val_loss",
  patience = 3,
  restore_best_weights = TRUE
)

history <- model %>% fit(
  x_train, y_train,
  batch_size = batch_size,
  epochs = epochs,
  validation_split = 0.2,
  callbacks = list(callback_es),
  verbose = 2
)


# Plot training curve

plot(history)

df_hist <- data.frame(
  epoch    = 1:length(history$metrics$loss),
  loss     = history$metrics$loss,
  val_loss = history$metrics$val_loss,
  acc      = history$metrics$accuracy,
  val_acc  = history$metrics$val_accuracy
)

ggplot(df_hist, aes(x = epoch)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = loss, colour = "Train Loss")) +
  geom_line(aes(y = val_loss, colour = "Val Loss")) +
  labs(title = "Big Caps BiLSTM: Training & Validation Loss",
       x = "Epoch", y = "Loss") +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(df_hist, aes(x = epoch)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = acc, colour = "Train Accuracy")) +
  geom_line(aes(y = val_acc, colour = "Val Accuracy")) +
  labs(title = "Big Caps BiLSTM: Training & Validation Accuracy",
       x = "Epoch", y = "Accuracy") +
  theme_minimal()


# Evaluate BiLSTM on Test Set

score <- model %>% evaluate(x_test, y_test, verbose = 0)
cat("\nBig Caps BiLSTM Test loss    :", round(score["loss"], 4), "\n")
cat("Big Caps BiLSTM Test accuracy:", round(score["accuracy"], 4), "\n")

acc_neuralbc <- as.numeric(score["accuracy"])


# Confusion Matrix for BiLSTM

pred_probs_nn <- model %>% predict(x_test)
pred_int_nn   <- apply(pred_probs_nn, 1, which.max) - 1

label_levels <- levels(train_databc$sentiment)

pred_labels_nn <- factor(label_levels[pred_int_nn + 1], levels = label_levels)
true_labels_nn <- factor(label_levels[y_test_int + 1], levels = label_levels)

cm_neural <- confusionMatrix(pred_labels_nn, true_labels_nn)
cat("\n=== BiLSTM Confusion Matrix ===\n")
print(cm_neural)

cm_neural_tbl <- as.data.frame(cm_neural$table)
ggplot(cm_neural_tbl, aes(x = Reference, y = Prediction, fill = Freq)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = Freq), colour = "white", size = 4) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "grey40", high = "darkgreen") +
  labs(title = "Big Caps Neural Confusion Matrix (Embedding + BiLSTM)",
       x = "True Sentiment", y = "Predicted Sentiment") +
  theme_minimal()


knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r Compare Baseline and Big Caps, include=TRUE}

cat("Baseline (TF-IDF + Logistic Regression) Accuracy:",
    round(acc_baseline, 4), "\n")
cat("Neural (Embedding + BiLSTM) Accuracy           :",
    round(acc_neural, 4), "\n")
cat("Big Caps Baseline (TF-IDF + Logistic Regression) Accuracy:",
    round(acc_baselinebc, 4), "\n")
cat("Big Caps Neural (Embedding + BiLSTM) Accuracy           :",
    round(acc_neuralbc, 4), "\n")

accuracy_df <- data.frame(
  Model = factor(c("Baseline (All)", "Neural (All)",
                   "Baseline (Big Caps)", "Neural (Big Caps)"),
                 levels = c("Baseline (All)", "Neural (All)",
                            "Baseline (Big Caps)", "Neural (Big Caps)")),
  Accuracy = c(acc_baseline, acc_neural, acc_baselinebc, acc_neuralbc)
)

ggplot(accuracy_df, aes(x = Model, y = Accuracy, fill = Model)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.65) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", Accuracy)),
            vjust = -0.5, size = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("lightblue", "lightgreen", "steelblue", "darkgreen")) +
  ylim(0, 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Comparison of Model Accuracies",
    x = "Model Type",
    y = "Accuracy"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 25, hjust = 1)
  )


knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
